abilities.name: damp
abilities.shortEffect: Prevents Self-Destruct, Explosion, and Aftermath from working while the Pokémon is in battle.
abilities.effect: While this Pokémon is in battle, Self-Destruct and Explosion will fail and Aftermath will not take effect.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon dampens its surroundings, preventing all Pokémon from using explosive moves such as Self-Destruct.

abilities.name: water-absorb
abilities.shortEffect: Absorbs Water moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.
abilities.effect: Whenever a Water-type move hits this Pokémon, it heals for 1/4 of its maximum HP, negating any other effect on it. Water moves will ignore this Pokémon's Substitute.
abilities.flavorText: If hit by a Water-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.

abilities.name: unaware
abilities.shortEffect: Ignores other Pokémon's stat modifiers for damage and accuracy calculation.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon ignores other Pokémon's stat modifiers for the purposes of damage and accuracy calculation. Effectively, this affects modifiers of every stat except Speed. The power of Punishment and Stored Power is calculated as usual. When this Pokémon hurts itself in confusion, its stat modifiers affect damage as usual.
abilities.flavorText: When attacking, the Pokémon ignores the target's stat changes.
